member.summary:
MediatR pipeline behaviour that logs the start, completion, and elapsed time of every command and query. Uses structured logging via Serilog-compatible .
Logs a warning when any handler takes longer than milliseconds.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Behaviours.TransactionBehaviour`2
member.summary: Pipeline behaviour that wraps the request execution in a database transaction boundary. Applies to any request implementing .

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Behaviours.ValidationBehaviour`2
member.summary:
MediatR pipeline behaviour that runs all registered instances for the incoming request before the handler executes.
Returns when validation fails rather than throwing, keeping the Result pattern clean across layer boundaries.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.CreatePayrollComponent.CreatePayrollComponentCommand
member.summary:
Command to create a new payroll component for a company. Sent by the PayrollComponentFormViewModel in the WPF UI.
Validation is enforced by via the MediatR pipeline before the handler executes.
member.param: The owning company (must match current user's access).
Unique uppercase code for the company. Max 20 chars.
Human-readable name displayed on payslips. Max 200 chars.
Classification: Earning, Deduction, Allowance, Benefit, Statutory.
Dollar amount or % value. Required for Fixed and Percentage methods.
Formula expression. Required for Formula method.
Whether this component contributes to PAYE taxable income.
Whether this component contributes to FNPF-applicable gross.
